languages.text: {n}Удар заставляет Ферренца пошатнуться. Его визоры хаотично перефокусируются, словно перегруженные противоречивыми потоками данных. На несколько мгновений генетор замирает. Затем медленно склоняет голову:{/n} "Приказ принят, Лорд-капитан". {n}Дрожащие руки тянутся к аугменту.{/n} "Да простит меня Омниссия за грядущее осквернение машинного таинства".

traits.locale_text: {n}Удар заставляет Ферренца пошатнуться. Его визоры хаотично перефокусируются, словно перегруженные противоречивыми потоками данных. На несколько мгновений генетор замирает. Затем медленно склоняет голову:{/n} "Приказ принят, Лорд-капитан". {n}Дрожащие руки тянутся к аугменту.{/n} "Да простит меня Омниссия за грядущее осквернение машинного таинства".

languages.text: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."

Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."

languages.text: {n}这一击让费伦茨踉跄了一下。他的目镜混乱地重新对焦，仿佛被互相冲突的数据流淹没了。基因士僵了片刻，随后缓缓垂下了头。{/n}“遵命，舰长大人。”{n}他颤抖的双手伸向那植入物。{/n}“愿欧姆尼赛亚宽恕我即将犯下的、这亵渎神圣机械仪式的罪行。”
languages.original_text: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."

traits.locale_text: {n}这一击让费伦茨踉跄了一下。他的目镜混乱地重新对焦，仿佛被互相冲突的数据流淹没了。基因士僵了片刻，随后缓缓垂下了头。{/n}“遵命，舰长大人。”{n}他颤抖的双手伸向那植入物。{/n}“愿欧姆尼赛亚宽恕我即将犯下的、这亵渎神圣机械仪式的罪行。”

languages.text: {n}El golpe hace que Ferrenz se tambalee. Sus visores se reajustan de forma errática, como si luchasen por procesar datos conflictivos. El genetor se queda paralizado durante unos instantes, y luego inclina la cabeza muy despacio.{/n} «Como usted ordene, Lord Capitán». {n}Extiende las manos temblorosas para tomar el aumento.{/n} «Que el Omnissiah me perdone por mi inminente violación de los sacrosantos rituales mecánicos».
languages.original_text: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."

traits.locale_text: {n}El golpe hace que Ferrenz se tambalee. Sus visores se reajustan de forma errática, como si luchasen por procesar datos conflictivos. El genetor se queda paralizado durante unos instantes, y luego inclina la cabeza muy despacio.{/n} «Como usted ordene, Lord Capitán». {n}Extiende las manos temblorosas para tomar el aumento.{/n} «Que el Omnissiah me perdone por mi inminente violación de los sacrosantos rituales mecánicos».

languages.text: {n}Le coup fait reculer Ferrenz. Ses visières bougent de façon erratique, comme s'il était noyé sous des flux de données conflictuelles. Pendant un instant, le genetor reste immobile. Il incline finalement la tête d'un mouvement lent.{/n} « À vos ordres, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Ses mains tremblantes prennent l'augmentation.{/n} « Puisse l'Omnimessie me pardonner pour cette violation des rituels des machines sacrées... »
languages.original_text: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le coup fait reculer Ferrenz. Ses visières bougent de façon erratique, comme s'il était noyé sous des flux de données conflictuelles. Pendant un instant, le genetor reste immobile. Il incline finalement la tête d'un mouvement lent.{/n} « À vos ordres, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Ses mains tremblantes prennent l'augmentation.{/n} « Puisse l'Omnimessie me pardonner pour cette violation des rituels des machines sacrées... »

languages.text: {n}Der Schlag lässt Ferrenz wanken. Seine Visoren refokussieren chaotisch, als würden sie mit widersprüchlichen Datenströmen gespeist. Der Genetor erstarrt einige Augenblicke. Dann senkt er langsam den Kopf.{/n} "Wie Ihr befehlt, Lord Captain." {n}Seine zitternden Händen greifen nach der Augmentation.{/n} "Möge mir der Omnissiah die nahende Verletzung der Riten der heiligen Maschine vergeben."
languages.original_text: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Schlag lässt Ferrenz wanken. Seine Visoren refokussieren chaotisch, als würden sie mit widersprüchlichen Datenströmen gespeist. Der Genetor erstarrt einige Augenblicke. Dann senkt er langsam den Kopf.{/n} "Wie Ihr befehlt, Lord Captain." {n}Seine zitternden Händen greifen nach der Augmentation.{/n} "Möge mir der Omnissiah die nahende Verletzung der Riten der heiligen Maschine vergeben."

languages.text: {n}Darbe, Ferrenz'i sendeletiyor. Vizörleri, sanki çelişkili veri akışları tarafından ezilmişçesine kaotik bir şekilde yeniden odaklanıyor. Birkaç saniyeliğine Genetör donup kalıyor. Ardından yavaşça başını eğiyor.{/n} "Nasıl emrederseniz Lord Kaptan." {n}Titreyen elleri ogmente uzanıyor.{/n} "Kutsal makine ayinlerinin bu ihlali için Hermesih beni affetsin."
languages.original_text: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."

traits.locale_text: {n}Darbe, Ferrenz'i sendeletiyor. Vizörleri, sanki çelişkili veri akışları tarafından ezilmişçesine kaotik bir şekilde yeniden odaklanıyor. Birkaç saniyeliğine Genetör donup kalıyor. Ardından yavaşça başını eğiyor.{/n} "Nasıl emrederseniz Lord Kaptan." {n}Titreyen elleri ogmente uzanıyor.{/n} "Kutsal makine ayinlerinin bu ihlali için Hermesih beni affetsin."

languages.text: {n}一撃でフェレンツはよろめいた。彼のバイザーは混乱し、データの衝突に圧倒されたかのように、乱れた視界を映し出す。数秒間、ジェネーターは凍りついた。そして、彼はゆっくりと頭を下げた。{/n}「おっしゃる通り、艦長様。」{n}彼の震える手は増幅器を掴む。{/n}「この聖なる機械礼儀の侵害に、オムニシアが許しを与えてくれることを祈る。」
languages.original_text: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."
